title: IAG5 Script: compliance_generate_pdf.py
description: Generates a multi-page PDF audit report from scan results. Uses reportlab/fpdf2. Called once per scan inside the Generate Report child workflow.

scan_results.description: Full scan results from the Evaluate & Grade phase

standard_name.description: Name of the compliance standard evaluated

timestamp.description: Scan timestamp to include in report header

pdf_base64.description: Base64-encoded PDF binary. Passed directly to email adapter as attachment.

page_count.description: Number of pages in the generated PDF

pages: Page 1: Executive Summary — posture score, fleet breakdown, scan metadata (scan_id, timestamp, standard, device_group, device_count)
Page 2+: Fleet Overview Table — one row per device: name, score, violation_count, critical_violation_count
Page N+: Device Detail — one section per non-compliant/partial device with per-rule results and evidence lines
